## LibraryData.IEncryptionConfig.secrets property

Array of named secrets to use for decryption. Each secret has a name and a 32-byte key for AES-256 encryption.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly secrets?: ReadonlyArray<CryptoUtils.INamedSecret>;
```
